photos.description: Array of profile picture URL's. We take the first one as user avatar.

value.description: Needs to be a complete and valid url.

userName.description: The user's username, usually their email address'

manager.description: User ID of user's manager which can be a LeapsomeId, an email or the externalId
User ID of user's manager which can be a LeapsomeId, an email or the externalId

items.description: User ID of user's additional manager which can be a LeapsomeId, an email or the externalId

department.description: The team name of the user's department

costCenter.description: The team name of the user's cost center

level.description: Current level of the employee as a string.

startDate.description: Employment start Date as a string in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

endDate.description: Employment end Date as a string in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

birthday.description: Birthday of the employee (used for data segmentation) as a string in ISO-8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

6140868326541a4da586db0b.description: Value of a given custom attribute identified via its ID. Get the custom attribute ID from the Users & Teams tab.

6140868326541a4da586db0c.description: Value of a given custom attribute identified via its ID. Get the custom attribute ID from the Users & Teams tab.

gender.description: Gender of the employee as a string(male, female, diverse)

location.description: Location of the employee as a string.

active.description: Activate (true) or deactivate (false) a user if provided. If the user has been active before, the account will be active again while it might be in a "invited" or "created" state if the user never accepted an invitation before.
